## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `nix fmt`
- [ ] I ran relevant checks/tests (`nix flake check` or targeted checks)
- [ ] I updated docs for any user-visible behavior or option changes
- [ ] I documented security impact (especially for namespace/DNS/egress
      semantics)
- [ ] I noted compatibility/migration impact if this changes existing behavior

## Security impact

Describe whether this changes:

- fail-closed behavior
- DNS leak resistance behavior
- highAssurance semantics
- default hardening posture
